glosses.vi: túng thiếu; tình trạng khẩn cấp

sentences.target: In der Not hilft man einander.

translations.de: In der Not hilft man einander.
translations.en: In times of need, people help each other.
translations.es: En tiempos difíciles, la gente se ayuda.
translations.fr: Dans les moments difficiles, on s'entraide.
translations.it: Nei momenti difficili, ci si aiuta.
translations.zh-Hans: 遇到困难时大家会互相帮忙。
translations.yue: 有困難嘅時候大家會互相幫手。
translations.ru: В трудные времена люди помогают друг другу.
translations.pt: Em momentos difíceis, as pessoas se ajudam.
translations.he: ברגעים קשים אנשים עוזרים זה לזה.
translations.tr: Zor zamanlarda insanlar birbirine yardım eder.
translations.vi: Lúc khó khăn, mọi người giúp đỡ nhau.
translations.ar: في الأوقات الصعبة، يساعد الناس بعضهم البعض.
translations.nl: In moeilijke tijden helpen mensen elkaar.
translations.uk: У важкі часи люди допомагають одне одному.
translations.hu: Nehéz időkben az emberek segítik egymást.
translations.hi: मुश्किल वक्त में लोग एक-दूसरे की मदद करते हैं।
translations.pl: W trudnych chwilach ludzie pomagają sobie nawzajem.
translations.el: Σε δύσκολους καιρούς οι άνθρωποι βοηθούν ο ένας τον άλλον.
translations.nb: I tøffe tider hjelper folk hverandre.
translations.id: Saat masa sulit, orang saling membantu.
translations.sv: I svåra tider hjälper människor varandra.
translations.ro: În vremuri grele, oamenii se ajută între ei.
translations.cs: V těžkých chvílích si lidé navzájem pomáhají.
translations.da: I svære tider hjælper folk hinanden.
translations.ja: 困ったときはみんなで助け合う。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing dative; introduces the circumstantial PP 'in der Not'.
Definite article, dative singular feminine; determiner of 'Not' with 'in'.
Feminine noun, dative singular; object of the preposition 'in'.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present; main predicate, selects a dative object.
Indefinite pronoun used as impersonal subject (3rd person singular).
Reciprocal pronoun, dative (required by 'helfen'); indirect object.

translations.vi: Ở đây thiếu thốn rất nhiều.
translations.id: Di sini banyak yang membutuhkan bantuan.
translations.ja: ここは困っている人が多いです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular feminine; marks 'Not' as the subject.
Feminine noun, nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary, 3rd person singular present; links subject to predicative complement.
Adverb of place; specifies location.
Predicative adjective complement to 'ist'; describes the degree/extent.

translations.en: There is hardship in the village.
translations.es: En el pueblo hay mucha necesidad.
translations.fr: Dans le village, la situation est difficile.
translations.vi: Trong làng đang rất khó khăn.
translations.nl: In het dorp is het zwaar.
translations.hi: गाँव में हालात बहुत कठिन हैं।
translations.el: Στο χωριό τα πράγματα είναι δύσκολα.
translations.nb: Det er harde tider i bygda.
translations.da: I landsbyen er der hårde tider.

tokens.explanation: Fused form of 'in dem'; preposition governing dative; introduces a locative PP.
Neuter noun, dative singular; object of the preposition 'im'.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present; intransitive main predicate meaning 'to prevail'.
Feminine noun, nominative singular; subject with intransitive 'herrschen'.

sentences.target: Er arbeitet trotz der Not weiter.

translations.de: Er arbeitet trotz der Not weiter.
translations.en: He keeps working despite the hardship.
translations.es: Sigue trabajando a pesar de las dificultades.
translations.fr: Il continue à travailler malgré les difficultés.
translations.it: Continua a lavorare nonostante le difficoltà.
translations.zh-Hans: 他在困难中仍坚持工作。
translations.yue: 佢喺困難之下都繼續做嘢。
translations.ru: Он продолжает работать, несмотря на трудности.
translations.pt: Ele continua trabalhando apesar das dificuldades.
translations.vi: Anh ấy vẫn tiếp tục làm việc dù đang rất khó khăn.
translations.nl: Hij blijft werken ondanks de moeilijkheden.
translations.hi: मुश्किलों के बावजूद वह काम करता रहता है।
translations.el: Συνεχίζει να δουλεύει παρά τις δυσκολίες.
translations.nb: Han fortsetter å jobbe til tross for vanskelighetene.
translations.id: Dia tetap bekerja meski keadaannya sulit.
translations.sv: Han fortsätter att jobba trots svårigheterna.
translations.ro: El continuă să muncească în ciuda greutăților.
translations.da: Han fortsætter med at arbejde på trods af vanskelighederne.
translations.ja: 困難な中でも彼は仕事を続けている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative singular masculine; subject.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present; main predicate; part of separable verb 'weiterarbeiten'.
Preposition governing genitive; introduces a concessive PP.
Definite article, genitive singular feminine; determiner of 'Not' after 'trotz'.
Feminine noun, genitive singular; object of the preposition 'trotz'.
Separable verbal particle forming the complex predicate 'weiterarbeiten' (to continue working).
